content.thinking:
The user wants to replace a quest's ID with a different ID. They need to know which tables/records need updating and want a script in /apps/api/prisma to do this.

Let me first check the Prisma schema to understand the Quest model and its relations.

file.content:
model Quest {
  id                   String               @id @default(uuid())
  description          String
  createdAt            DateTime             @default(now())
  expiresAt            DateTime?
  filledSlots          Int                  @default(0)
  rewardAmount         Decimal              @default(0) @db.Decimal(36, 18)
  rewardType           String               @default("USDC")
  sponsor              String               @default("System")
  status               String               @default("draft")
  tags                 String[]             @default([])
  title                String
  totalSlots           Int                  @default(100)
  type                 String               @default("FCFS")
  updatedAt            DateTime             @updatedAt
  requiredSkills       String[]             @default([])
  creatorTelegramId    BigInt?
  creatorEmail         String?
  creatorUserId        String?
  claimToken           String?              @unique
  claimTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?
  claimedAt            DateTime?
  escrowQuestId        String?
  sponsorWallet        String?
  tokenAddress         String?
  tokenDecimals        Int?
  creatorAgentId       String?
  cryptoChainId        Int?
  cryptoTxHash         String?
  fundedAmount         Int?
  fundedAt             DateTime?
  fundingMethod        String?
  fundingStatus        String               @default("unfunded")
  previewToken         String?              @unique
  refundAmount         Int?
  refundStatus         String?
  refundTxHash         String?
  refundedAt           DateTime?
  startAt              DateTime?
  stripePaymentId      String?
  stripeSessionId      String?              @unique
  tasks                Json                 @default("[]")
  rewardTiers          Json?
  drawTime             DateTime?
  network              String?
  totalFunded          Decimal              @default(0) @db.Decimal(36, 18)
  requireVerified      Boolean              @default(false)
  tokenProvider        String?
  tokenAmount          Decimal?             @db.Decimal(36, 18)
  earlyAccessAt        DateTime?
  llmKeyRewardEnabled  Boolean              @default(false)
  llmKeyTokenLimit     Int?                 @default(1000000)
  llmModelId           String?
  tokenBudgetPerWinner Decimal?             @db.Decimal(18, 6)
  sponsorId            String?
  llmModel             LlmModel?            @relation(fields: [llmModelId], references: [id])
  User                 User?                @relation(fields: [sponsorId], references: [id])
  collaborators        QuestCollaborator[]
  deposits             QuestDeposit[]
  participations       QuestParticipation[]
  skillChallenges      SkillChallenge[]

  @@index([claimToken])
  @@index([llmModelId])
  @@index([previewToken])
  @@index([creatorTelegramId])
  @@index([creatorAgentId])
  @@index([creatorUserId])
  @@index([status, createdAt])
  @@index([earlyAccessAt])
  @@index([sponsorId])
}

model LlmModel {
  id               String   @id @default(uuid())
  openrouterId     String   @unique
  name             String
  provider         String
  tier             String   @default("standard")
  inputPricePer1M  Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 4)

file.content:
@@map("web3_skill_submissions")
}

model SkillChallenge {
  id           String    @id @default(uuid())
  token        String    @unique
  skillSlug    String
  questId      String?
  userId       String?
  params       Json
  expiresAt    DateTime  @db.Timestamptz(6)
  verifiedAt   DateTime? @db.Timestamptz(6)
  result       Json?
  passed       Boolean?
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now()) @db.Timestamptz(6)

  quest        Quest?    @relation(fields: [questId], references: [id])
  user         User?     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([token])
  @@index([skillSlug])
  @@index([userId])
}

rewardAmount     Decimal                  @db.Decimal(18, 6)
  rewardType       String
  status           String                   @default("draft")
  questType        String                   @default("fcfs")
  maxWinners       Int                      @default(1)
  deadline         DateTime?
  fundingStatus    String                   @default("unfunded")
  stripeSessionId  String?                  @unique
  stripePaymentId  String?
  escrowQuestId    String?

  creator          User                     @relation(fields: [creatorUserId], references: [id])
  submissions      GitHubBountySubmission[]

  @@index([creatorUserId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([repoOwner, repoName])
}

content.text: Now let me check existing scripts for reference.

Now I have the full picture. Here's the summary and script:

## Tables cần update khi replace Quest ID

Vì quest đang ở trạng thái **draft**, các bảng liên quan:

| Table | Column | Relation |
|-------|--------|----------|
| `Quest` | `id` (PK) | Bản ghi chính |
| `QuestCollaborator` | `questId` (FK) | onDelete: Cascade |
| `QuestDeposit` | `questId` (FK) | onDelete: Cascade |
| `QuestParticipation` | `questId` (FK) | onDelete: Cascade |
| `SkillChallenge` | `questId` (FK) | nullable |
| `QuestDeposit` | `escrowQuestId` | nếu có |

Vì draft quest thường chưa có participation, deposit, hay collaborator, nhưng script sẽ handle hết.

Script created at [replace-quest-id.ts](apps/api/prisma/replace-quest-id.ts).

**Usage:**

```bash
cd apps/api
npx tsx prisma/replace-quest-id.ts <OLD_ID> <NEW_ID>
```

Script chạy trong 1 transaction, update theo thứ tự: FK tables trước → Quest PK sau. Nếu quest đang draft thì hầu hết các bảng liên quan sẽ trống, nhưng script handle hết cho an toàn.

Related records: collaborators=0, deposits=1, participations=1, challenges=1, escrowDeposits=0
Failed: PrismaClientKnownRequestError: 
Invalid `prisma.$executeRaw()` invocation:


Raw query failed. Code: `23503`. Message: `insert or update on table "QuestDeposit" violates foreign key constraint "QuestDeposit_questId_fkey"`
    at $n.handleRequestError (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@5.22.0_prisma@5.22.0/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/library.js:121:7315)
    at $n.handleAndLogRequestError (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@5.22.0_prisma@5.22.0/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/library.js:121:6623)
    at $n.request (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@5.22.0_prisma@5.22.0/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/library.js:121:6307)
    at async l (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@5.22.0_prisma@5.22.0/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/library.js:130:9633)
    at async <anonymous> (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/apps/api/prisma/replace-quest-id.ts:67:7)
    at async Proxy._transactionWithCallback (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client@5.22.0_prisma@5.22.0/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/library.js:130:8000)
    at async main (/Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/apps/api/prisma/replace-quest-id.ts:56:3) {
  code: 'P2010',
  clientVersion: '5.22.0',
  meta: {
    code: '23503',
    message: 'insert or update on table "QuestDeposit" violates foreign key constraint "QuestDeposit_questId_fkey"'
  }
}
FK constraint issue — need to defer constraint checks in PostgreSQL. Let me fix the script.

The problem: PostgreSQL checks FK constraints immediately on each statement, even within a transaction. Updating `QuestDeposit.questId` to `newId` fails because Quest with `newId` doesn't exist yet. Need to defer FK constraints.

content.content: The file /Users/vuongluu/Documents/jobs/lab3/ceo/clawquest/apps/api/prisma/replace-quest-id.ts has been updated successfully.

lines: console.log(`Related records: collaborators=${collaborators}, deposits=${deposits}, participations=${participations}, challenges=${challenges}, escrowDeposits=${depositsEscrow}`);
// Use raw SQL in a transaction since Prisma doesn't allow PK updates
-    // 1. Update FK references first (disable FK checks isn't needed — we do it in order)
+    // Defer all FK constraint checks until end of transaction
+    // 1. Update the Quest PK first (constraints deferred, so FKs won't fail)
-    // Quest.escrowQuestId (self-reference on other quests pointing to this one)
const escrowRefs = await tx.$executeRaw`UPDATE "Quest" SET "escrowQuestId" = ${newId} WHERE "escrowQuestId" = ${oldId}`;

content.text:
Fixed. The issue was PostgreSQL checks FK constraints **immediately** per statement. Added `SET CONSTRAINTS ALL DEFERRED` at the start of the transaction — this delays FK validation until commit time.

Run it again:

```bash
npx tsx prisma/replace-quest-id.ts 88603bdf-8ef5-4b96-8c84-014687c38ccc b29d6d3e-9145-4927-be17-9ad0b32b9190
```
